---
title: "SuppFig5A_SignalingHeatmap"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-18"
---

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(Matrix)
library(pheatmap)

# Genes shown in heatmap
genes_use <- c(
  "NGF-AS1","NGF","TGFB2","TGFBR2","PDGFRA","FGF2","PDGFC",
  "VEGFC","FGF10","FGF10-AS1","FGF1","PDGFRB","VEGFA",
  "IGF2R","PDGFA","EGFR","EGFR-AS1","HGF","PDGFRL","TGFBR1",
  "IGF2","VEGFB","PDGFD","IGF1","FGF7","IGF1R","NGFR",
  "GDF15","TGFB1","PDGFB","VEGFD","PDGFA-DT","NGFR-AS1"
)

# Lineage and stage columns
lineage_col <- "predicted.ann_level_1"
stage_col <- "Donor_Group"

lineage_order <- c("Endothelial", "Epithelial", "Immune", "Stroma")

stage_order <- c(
  "PT_NEWBORN",
  "FT_NEWBORN",
  "INFANT",
  "Children",
  "Adolescent",
  "Young_Adult",
  "Aged_or_Diseased",
  "PT_BPD"
)

# Keep lineages and stages
obj_sub <- subset(
  obj,
  subset = predicted.ann_level_1 %in% lineage_order &
           Donor_Group %in% stage_order
)

# Expression matrix
expr_mat <- GetAssayData(
  obj_sub,
  assay = "RNA",
  layer = "data"
)

genes_use <- genes_use[genes_use %in% rownames(expr_mat)]

expr_sub <- expr_mat[genes_use, , drop = FALSE]

meta <- obj_sub@meta.data
meta <- meta[colnames(expr_sub), ]

# Combined lineage-stage group
meta$Lineage_Stage <- paste(
  meta[[lineage_col]],
  meta[[stage_col]],
  sep = "_"
)

group_order <- as.vector(
  outer(
    lineage_order,
    stage_order,
    paste,
    sep = "_"
  )
)

group_order <- group_order[group_order %in% unique(meta$Lineage_Stage)]

# Average expression per lineage-stage
avg_exp <- sapply(group_order, function(grp) {
  cells <- rownames(meta)[meta$Lineage_Stage == grp]
  Matrix::rowMeans(expr_sub[, cells, drop = FALSE])
})

avg_exp <- as.matrix(avg_exp)
colnames(avg_exp) <- group_order

# Remove genes with no expression or no variation
avg_exp <- avg_exp[rowSums(avg_exp) > 0, , drop = FALSE]
avg_exp <- avg_exp[apply(avg_exp, 1, sd) > 0, , drop = FALSE]

# Row z-score
avg_exp_z <- t(scale(t(avg_exp)))
avg_exp_z <- avg_exp_z[complete.cases(avg_exp_z), , drop = FALSE]

# Clip for plotting
avg_exp_z_clipped <- avg_exp_z
avg_exp_z_clipped[avg_exp_z_clipped > 2] <- 2
avg_exp_z_clipped[avg_exp_z_clipped < -2] <- -2

# Column annotation
annotation_col <- data.frame(
  Lineage = sapply(strsplit(colnames(avg_exp_z_clipped), "_"), `[`, 1)
)

rownames(annotation_col) <- colnames(avg_exp_z_clipped)

ann_colors <- list(
  Lineage = c(
    Endothelial = "#A6D900",
    Epithelial = "#F4A09C",
    Immune = "#00BFC4",
    Stroma = "#D883FF"
  )
)

# Better column names for display
display_colnames <- colnames(avg_exp_z_clipped)
display_colnames <- gsub("Endothelial_", "", display_colnames)
display_colnames <- gsub("Epithelial_", "", display_colnames)
display_colnames <- gsub("Immune_", "", display_colnames)
display_colnames <- gsub("Stroma_", "", display_colnames)

display_colnames <- gsub("PT_NEWBORN", "PT_NEWBORN", display_colnames)
display_colnames <- gsub("FT_NEWBORN", "FT_NEWBORN", display_colnames)
display_colnames <- gsub("Young_Adult", "Young_Adult", display_colnames)
display_colnames <- gsub("Aged_or_Diseased", "Aged_or_Diseased", display_colnames)
display_colnames <- gsub("PT_BPD", "PT_BPD", display_colnames)

colnames(avg_exp_z_clipped) <- display_colnames
rownames(annotation_col) <- display_colnames

# Plot heatmap
pheatmap(
  avg_exp_z_clipped,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  annotation_col = annotation_col,
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  border_color = "black",
  color = colorRampPalette(c("#2166AC", "white", "#B2182B"))(100),
  breaks = seq(-2, 2, length.out = 101),
  legend_breaks = c(-2, -1, 0, 1, 2),
  legend_labels = c("-2", "-1", "0", "1", "2"),
  fontsize_row = 7,
  fontsize_col = 6,
  cellwidth = 12,
  cellheight = 8,
  angle_col = 90,
  main = "Lineage growth factor heatmap"
)

# Save source matrices
write.csv(avg_exp, "Lineage_Heatmap_RawAverageExpression.csv")
write.csv(avg_exp_z, "Lineage_Heatmap_RowZscore.csv")
write.csv(avg_exp_z_clipped, "Lineage_Heatmap_PLOTTED_MATRIX.csv")
```
